Briefly describe the feature or addition.

Who is this for and why is it useful?

Which page(s) does this affect, or should a new page be created?

How should it work on the website?

## 📐 Design Ideas (Optional)
Mockups, sketches, or references.

## 📝 Extra Notes
Anything else to consider.
